channel.title: Projects on Jenna Lu
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Jenna Lu

item.title: Biomedical Representation Learning
item.description: Applying dimensionality reduction and deep learning approaches to extract biological representations from molecular datasets.

item.title: Baseball Analytics
item.description: Applying statistical analysis and visualization techniques to baseball tracking data.

item.title: Interpretable CHD Risk Prediction
item.description: Interpretable machine learning pipeline for cardiovascular risk prediction.
